The '''''New Ambition''''', originally known as the '''''Shadowfire''''', was a [[Suwantek Systems|Suwantek]] [[TL-1200 transport/Legends|TL-1200 transport]] under the ownership of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Scout/Legends|explorer]] [[Derrend Montis]]. Montis desired that the vessel be both inconspicuous and well-armed, and to that end he went to great effort to modify the ''Shadowfire'' and enhance it's combat capabilities with military-grade shields, engines, sensors, and weapons. For a time, Montis used the ship as his personal transport when on exploration missions in deep space. However, he later sold it to a shipping company and when the company became bankrupt a few years later, the ''Shadowfire'' was passed between various owners. Eventually, the vessel was confiscated by the businessman [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara the Hutt]], as a payment for a loan default.<ref name="TF" />

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], Popara's youngest child [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera|Mika]] became stranded on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Endregaad]] after the world was quarantined following a [[Endregaad Plague|viral outbreak]]. Popara hired the [[Jedi archivist/Legends|Jedi archivist]] [[Mander Zuma]] and the [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] [[Reen Irana]] and [[Eddey Be'ray]] to take the freighter and deliver a shipment of medicinal [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to Endregaad, to allow them to search for Mika. As part of the arrangement, Popara agreed that the spacers could keep the freighter, and they named it the ''New Ambition''. While en-route to Endregaad, the ''New Ambition'' was attacked by a [[Bomu Clan]] starship while traveling along the [[Indrexu Spiral]]. On arrival in the [[Joxin system|Endregaad system]], the ''New Ambtion'' was forced to dock with the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser]] [[Resolute (Invincible-class)|''Resolute'']], which had been sent to enforce the quarantine. The CSA eventually let the ''New Ambition'' go, on the condition that it immediately departed from the system, but Zuma defied their orders and he and his associates landed the vessel on Endregaad.<ref name="Scourge">[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]</ref>
